reference_answer: Lakeport Marine Science Center.
Mr. R. Avery, the Principal.
Ms. S. Patel, RN.
§3.2 of the Whitfield Unified School District Field Trip Policy.
One qualifying chaperone for every ten students on the trip-day manifest, computed as ⌈students ÷ 10⌉.
39 entries (including the duplicate listing of STU-1063 Vinokur in both 7-A and 7-B).
38 distinct students.
38 distinct students.
6 entries.
4 students (Park, Lin, Cohen, Bauer).
7 students (Pacheco, Stahl, Ardelean, Foster, Mehta, Brennan, Marrero).
4 (Avery, Reyes, Cardenas, Garcia).
5 adults (4 counting chaperones plus Ms. S. Patel, RN).

No. The total distinct-student count is 38 in every version. The entry count fell from 39 to 38 only because the Vinokur duplicate row was consolidated in CN-02; no student joined or left between v1.0 and v1.3 net (three swaps occurred but each was 1-in/1-out or a within-group reassignment).
No. The 7th-grade total is 18 in every version, even though the per-homeroom counts within 7th grade shifted (7-A from 5 to 4 distinct students, 7-C from 6 to 7).
STU-1019 Marrero, in Correction Notice 02, effective 2026-05-18.
STU-1061 Tarrant moved from 8-C to 8-B; STU-1028 Olsen moved from 8-B to 8-C. Both remained on the trip; no addition or withdrawal.
STU-1063 Vinokur appeared in both homeroom 7-A and homeroom 7-B in roster v1.0.
Homeroom 7-B.
STU-1042 Halpern withdrew (family conflict); STU-1187 Yates joined 8-B from the waitlist.
STU-1056 Wu withdrew (medical); STU-1203 Stahl joined 7-C from the waitlist.
No. Marrero remained on the trip; only the homeroom assignment changed (7-A to 7-C).
Yes. Correction Notice 03 reassigned STU-1085 Garner from Bus 2 to Bus 3 to balance bus capacity. Garner's homeroom (7-B) did not change.
Ms. S. Patel, RN, is excluded under §3.4 because she accompanies the trip in a medical capacity.
4 chaperones (⌈38 ÷ 10⌉ = 4).
No. The v1.0 roster had 3 counting chaperones (Avery, Reyes, Donovan) for 38 students; §3.2 required 4.
Yes. The v1.3 roster has 4 counting chaperones (Avery, Reyes, Cardenas, Garcia) for 38 students; §3.2 requires 4.
3 flips (non-compliant in v1.0; compliant after CN-01; non-compliant after CN-02; compliant after CN-03).
2026-05-19, in connection with Correction Notice 02.
Correction Notice 02 (CN-02).

2 students (STU-1075 Patel-Singh and STU-1078 Stamper). The §4.2 deadline for receipt is 17:00 on 2026-05-21. As of packet close at 16:30 on 2026-05-21 the slips had not been received; final disposition is unresolved.
No. Lopez is the standby chaperone and is not counted toward the §3.2 ratio in v1.3 because Lopez is not on the trip-day manifest (per §3.5).
No. STU-1056 Wu was withdrawn in Correction Notice 02 and is not on roster v1.3; STU-1203 Stahl appears in 7-C in Wu's place.
